title: DRW MD-DRW-540: System Integration General Arrangement
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-540 Rev E — System Integration General Arrangement

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1001, P-1062, P-1091, P-1148, P-1154, P-1125.
4. Drawn by Felix Herrera, checked by Dr. Rhea Voss, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
